variants: Jori Al Hamad, an alumna of the Keystone Arts Conservatory, has established herself as a notable figure in horticulture with her certification, the Starship Gardener Label. In the community, she is devoted to sustainability through her role as the Garden Program Coordinator Spruce Spring, fostering a love for gardening among local residents. Proficient in the Georgian alphabet, Jori skillfully integrates this language into her writings, enhancing their reach. Her work is marked by a commitment to both environmental stewardship and community engagement.
